raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint because Citibank has failed to properly investigate a material misrepresentation by the merchant ( XXXX ). The merchant sold a 'Hotel ' ( secure interior-corridor access ) but delivered a 'Motel ' ( unsecured exterior doors ), creating a safety risk for a solo traveler. 

In their initial denial, Citibank explicitly acknowledged this security discrepancy in writing but still sided with the merchant 's refund policy. A 'Non-Refundable ' policy does not authorize a merchant to provide a structurally different product than advertised under the Fair Credit Billing Act ( Service Not as Described ). Citibank has since stalled my appeal, providing only an automated receipt of my request with no further action. I am asking for a reversal of the charges.
